name: Germinal
description: De novo antibody design targeted to an epitope using pipeline with hallucination with ColabDesign, sequence redesign with AbMPNN, and cofolding with structure prediction. Achieved an experimental success rate of 4-22% across all targets, testing only 43-101 designs for each antigen. Experimental: Modified to use AbLang2 instead of IgLM (which requires a commercial license). By default, tool is modified to remove rosetta metrics, due to licensing.
capabilities: De novo antibody design targeted to an epitope using pipeline with hallucination with ColabDesign, sequence redesign with AbMPNN, and cofolding with structure prediction
Achieved an experimental success rate of 4-22% across all targets, testing only 43-101 designs for each antigen
Experimental: Modified to use AbLang2 instead of IgLM (which requires a commercial license)
By default, tool is modified to remove rosetta metrics, due to licensing

pdbFile.description: Target protein structure in PDB format

targetChain.description: Chain ID of the target to design binder against

hotspotResidues.description: Target residue numbers for the binder to focus on

framework.description: Framework to use: 'generic' for standard templates or 'custom' for uploaded framework

frameworkPdbFile.description: Custom antibody framework PDB file (required when framework is 'custom')

numDesigns.description: Number of parallel design jobs to launch

omitAminoAcids.description: Comma-separated amino acids to exclude from CDR designs

useRosetta.description: Enable PyRosetta for additional biophysical scoring
